headline: REHEARSE THE INSPECTION
subheading: Catch every finding privately in a dry run before a regulator ever writes it up.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial scene evoking a pharmaceutical mock inspection dry run: two facing empty chairs across a polished dark-navy interview table catching soft directional light, suggesting an inspector and interviewee about to meet under scrutiny. A closed compliance binder, reading glasses and a sleek tablet rest on the surface, with a subtle magnifying-glass lens tracing a faint glowing audit-trail line that loops back on itself, a visual metaphor for a deviation chain closing through CAPA and verification. In the softly blurred background, a glass-walled cleanroom corridor recedes in cool teal and cyan, conveying precision and readiness. Deep navy walls, teal and cyan highlights, a single slender fresh-green plant stem introducing a crisp green accent at the frame edge. Shallow depth of field, clinical-luxury mood, calm composure before pressure, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
